name: Peach Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix the flour with enough cold water until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a pie crust lined with peaches.
4. Whisk together half and half and cinnamon in another bowl.
5. Spoon the cream over the peach filling.
6. Place the pie on a baking sheet to catch any spills.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until set.
8. Let cool before serving.
